test.create_query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS phj_right_nullable ( key Nullable(UInt64), val String ) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS phj_left ( key UInt64, val String ) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS phj_asof_left ( key UInt64, ts DateTime, val String ) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS phj_asof_right ( key UInt64, ts Nullable(DateTime), val String ) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO phj_left SELECT number % 1000, toString(number) FROM numbers(5000000)
INSERT INTO phj_right_nullable SELECT if(number % 50 = 0, NULL, number % 1000), toString(number) FROM numbers(5000000)
INSERT INTO phj_asof_left SELECT number % 500, toDateTime('2020-01-01') + number, toString(number) FROM numbers(2000000)
INSERT INTO phj_asof_right SELECT number % 500, if(number % 30 = 0, NULL, toDateTime('2020-01-01') + number * 2), toString(number) FROM numbers(2000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM (SELECT number % 10 AS k FROM numbers_mt(100000)) AS l INNER JOIN (SELECT number % 10 AS k FROM numbers_mt(100000)) AS r USING (k) FORMAT Null
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT key FROM phj_left LIMIT 1000000) AS l INNER JOIN (SELECT key FROM phj_left LIMIT 1000000) AS r USING (key) FORMAT Null
SELECT count() FROM phj_left AS l RIGHT JOIN phj_right_nullable AS r ON l.key = r.key FORMAT Null
SELECT count() FROM phj_left AS l FULL JOIN phj_right_nullable AS r ON l.key = r.key FORMAT Null
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT number AS key FROM numbers_mt(100)) AS l RIGHT JOIN (SELECT number AS key FROM numbers_mt(5000000)) AS r USING (key) FORMAT Null
SELECT count() FROM phj_asof_left AS l ASOF LEFT JOIN phj_asof_right AS r ON l.key = r.key AND l.ts <= r.ts FORMAT Null
